productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girls Party Frock Purple Dress
description: Composition Magenta sleeveless round neck frock made of satin, has mesh and cotton lining, sheer fabric layer on top, has stone embellishment at the wasit, a belt and a zipper at the back and five pairs of hair clips Fit Reuglar Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Warm iron Every mother loves to dress up her bundle of joy as a little princess. This frock from doodle will make your little one look like a miniature version of princesses in the fairy tales you read her to sleep. Pair it with sandals from Croc and the cute hair accessories that come with this frock.
